Now I'll extract the module names, remove the `pub mod` prefix and semicolon, and sort them lexicographically.

```json
["benchmark", "blast", "cache", "change_detail", "classifier", "cochange", "community", "context", "diff", "diff_json", "duplicates", "entity", "formatter", "git", "grouping", "hasher", "index", "inline_diff", "install", "json_index", "map", "markdown_formatter", "markdown_index", "matcher", "meta", "output", "parser", "query", "rank", "review", "signature", "tokens", "toml_index", "writer", "yaml_index"]
```
